title: UB3 1QF, Virtus Holdco Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/UP3624SW/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Virtus Holdco Limited   Installation name: DC6, Unit D, Plot C, Prologis Park Heathrow   Permit number: EPR/UP3624SW/A001   "
